worldData.instructions:
A night drive down a neon avenue — rain-wet road, HDR windows, a hazy moon.
The glowing ball is a real physics field: it caroms between the towers and reflects in the wet street.
No goals. Ride.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: Endless drive: conveyor tower pool (rows reborn ahead of the camera), engine physics, whiteboard.

stepHooks.author: fable
